summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Volatility Term Structure indicator feature. All core functionality working correctly including VIX/VIX3M ratio calculation, state determination, and frontend display.
passed_tests: ✅ /api/term-structure endpoint returns VIX, VIX3M, ratio, state, signal, market_implication
✅ Term structure state calculation logic correct (FLAT state for ratio 0.966)
✅ Frontend Term Structure panel displays correctly in right sidebar
✅ VIX/VIX3M ratio displayed as 0.966 with yellow color (FLAT state)
✅ State shown as 'FLAT' which is correct for ratio between 0.95-1.0
✅ VIX (30d) and VIX3M (90d) individual values displayed
✅ Market implication text shown: 'Market indecision, trend change possible'
✅ Backend state logic validates correctly for all thresholds
✅ Frontend panel responsive and properly styled
✅ Data refreshes correctly when switching symbols

success_percentage.backend: 95% (21/22 tests passed - only volatility combined endpoint failing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix /api/volatility/{symbol} endpoint returning 500 error. Individual endpoints work fine, but combined endpoint has integration issue.
